name: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc.
sic_description: Bottled & Canned Soft Drinks & Carbonated Waters
summary: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. is the largest Coca-Cola bottler in the United States, distributing, marketing, and manufacturing nonalcoholic beverages across 14 states and the District of Columbia, serving approximately 60 million consumers. Approximately 85% of bottle/can sales volume consists of The Coca-Cola Company products, including Coca-Cola, Sprite, and Dasani. The company also distributes Monster Energy and Dr Pepper products, offering sparkling and still beverages in bottle/can and post-mix formats.
